HISTORY OF PRESENT ILLNESS:             Patient is a 61 year
old male with history of coronary artery disease, type-2
diabetes, hypertension, who was transferred from NEBH for
cardiac catheterization after ruling in for myocardial
infarction.  Patient was originally admitted on 2007-01-17 to
NEBH for right knee replacement.  His postoperative course
was complicated by agitation/confusion.  He was treated with
Ativan.  DICTATION JUST STOPPED HERE.
